LanguageData.AllowCorpsesPersonaFriendly.description: Allow the dead bodies of friendly personae.
LanguageData.AllowCorpsesPersonaFriendly.label: allow friendly persona corpses
LanguageData.AllowCorpsesSyntheticlikeFriendly.descri: Allow the dead bodies of friendly mechanoids.
LanguageData.AllowCorpsesSyntheticlikeFriendly.label: allow friendly mech corpses
